subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! O My leaf! Hearken thou unto My call from the precincts of My prison. There is none other God but He, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی یا ورقتی ان استمعی ندائی من شطر سجنی انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
